report_name: Cyberattack on Nichirei disrupts Japan's food supply, impacts KFC

identities.name: Nichirei Corporation
identities.description: Japan's largest cold-chain logistics operator, which suffered a major cyberattack detected on July 13, 2026, forcing a shutdown of its operations and disrupting the national food supply chain.

identities.name: KFC Japan
identities.description: A major client of Nichirei Corporation that was impacted by the cyberattack, warning of potential menu restrictions and temporary store closures at its 1,300 locations due to ingredient shortages.

identities.name: Aeon
identities.description: A major retail client of Nichirei Corporation that was affected by the halt in logistics operations following the cyberattack.

identities.name: Colowide
identities.description: A restaurant operator and client of Nichirei Corporation that was affected by the supply chain disruption caused by the cyberattack.

identities.name: Nichirei Logistics Group
identities.description: The logistics division of Nichirei Corporation whose systems were taken offline to contain the cyberattack.

identities.name: Nichirei Foods
identities.description: The food division of Nichirei Corporation, which was impacted by the cyberattack on the parent company.
